boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: The app hit an unexpected error while rendering this screen. You can retry the current session or reload the application.

server.AUTH_USER_DISABLED: Your account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.
server.AUTH_TENANT_DISABLED: Your organization has been disabled. Please contact support.
server.AUTH_REFRESH_INVALID: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
server.AUTH_USER_NOT_FOUND: Your user account could not be found.
server.AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY: Your new password does not meet the security requirements.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_STEP_REQUIRED: Set a fraction step greater than zero before enabling fractional sales.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_REQUIRED: Set a minimum sale quantity greater than zero before enabling fractional sales.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_BELOW_STEP: The minimum sale quantity must be greater than or equal to the fraction step.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_NOT_ALIGNED: The minimum sale quantity must be a multiple of the fraction step.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_NOT_WHOLE: This product must be sold in whole units.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_BELOW_MINIMUM: This product must be sold with a minimum quantity.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_NOT_ALIGNED: This product must be sold in increments of its configured fraction step.
server.SALE_FRACTION_POLICY_MISSING: This product is missing its fraction policy configuration.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_INVALID: The quantity must be greater than zero.
server.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
